title: Psychilis buchii
taxonomy: Psychilis buchii is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. More specifically, it belongs to the genus Psychilis, which is a group of flowering plants native to the Caribbean. Psychilis buchii is one of the three species within the genus Psychilis, the others being Psychilis ashleyae and Psychilis lindeniana. The classification of Psychilis buchii is further supported by its unique characteristics, including its distinctive flowers and growth habits. The exact classification of Psychilis buchii may vary depending on the source, but it is generally accepted as a member of the Orchidaceae family.
